seo.title: Easy With Marinda - Haidee Muller - Marinda Kook

html:
Haidee Muller is a national treasure. She charms thousands of listeners every day on RSG with her stories and her voice. But she can't cook!! I tried to charm and convert her in my kitchen.

We made delicious risotto and fish. There was drinking, stirring and baking. She wanted to go home to impress her beloved Harry with the dishes. We'll just have to find out if my friend was successful.

Tune in on Thursday at 17:30 on VIA, channel 147 for this special episode.
